Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to respond as the LLM target: analyze anomalies, propose hypotheses, and propose SQL queries to investigate.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Should not give hints? Actually we need to propose queries.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Provide analysis of each case: check order of events not matching normal flow. Identify where activities out of order, missing steps, incorrect resource roles, payment before shipment or invoice, etc.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Provide hypotheses: system errors, process bypass, training, prioritization, fraud.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then propose SQL queries: e.g., find cases where activity order deviates, where credit check after shipment, where payment before invoice, where shipment scheduled N but shipped, etc. Use window functions, LAG/LEAD, self-joins. Also join orders and resources to check role/department mismatches.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Well output structured answer: sections: Anomalies Identified, Hypotheses, Investigative SQL Queries.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Make sure to reference tables correctly.
